WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA / MODULE 6 / ASSIGNMENT
HOW TO USE THIS PDF
• 	The first time you open this PDF it will open in your browser
• 	Do not attempt to fill out the PDF in your browser; it will not save
• 	Instead, download the file to your own computer
• 	Then, open the file using a PDF reader
• 	Fill out the PDF, then click Save
• 	Follow the instructions below to post your work to the Facebook group

WEBINAR FUNNEL FORMULA / MODULE 6 / ASSIGNMENT
YOUR ASSIGNMENT
Post a screenshot of 1 segment of your webinar script (1 page maximum).
STEP #1
Choose one of the following segments to script and submit for review:
• 	The Pivot
• 	Price Anchor and Price Reveal
• 	Benefits & Second-Level Benefits
• 	“This is Right for You”
STEP #2
Complete the Webinar Offer Script (see next page), maximum of one page.
Even if you choose not to word-for-word script your entire webinar, we suggest you
do so for the most important parts of your webinar and the parts you're most
concerned about.
For more on this topic see Modules 5 and 6.
STEP #3
On Saturday, you’ll see a post in the Webinar Funnel Formula Facebook group with
the following graphic. Post your assignment as a comment under this graphic by
11:00 am ET August 19th:
